title: maomod
description:
认真猫的模组开发之旅

Ren Zhen Mao's Module Development Journey
body:
## 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)

欢迎来到B站UP主**认真猫**的Fabric模组开发学习项目。在我的视频中，我将详细展示模组的使用方法。这个模组不仅适合对视频中创意感兴趣的玩家，也非常适合希望提升开发技能的开发者。

### 当前模组内容

目前模组的主要内容包括**苦力怕弓**。

![附魔了引雷的苦力怕弓](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac8f5a38968fd924888b7596f65d62914b3fc3.gif)

*苦力怕弓 - 附魔引雷效果*

![使用苦力怕弓和它的配套武器和其他玩家PvP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6be50f12d82b02a0e4a5254f76b8080c70e126e.gif)

*使用苦力怕弓与其他玩家进行PvP对战*


## English (英文)

Welcome to the Fabric mod development learning project by Bilibili creator **Ren Zhen Mao**. In my videos, I will provide detailed demonstrations on how to use the mod. This mod is perfect for players interested in the creative ideas showcased in the videos, as well as developers looking to enhance their skills.

### Current Module Content

The current content of this mod includes the **Creeper Bow**.

![The Creeper Bow enchanted with Channeling.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eac8f5a38968fd924888b7596f65d62914b3fc3.gif)

*Creeper Bow - Enchanted with Channeling*

![Use the Creeper Bow and its companion weapons to PvP with other players.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6be50f12d82b02a0e4a5254f76b8080c70e126e.gif)

*PvP with other players using the Creeper Bow and its companion weapons*
